title: Monitoring cell-surface expression of GPCR by ELISA
author: Elie Besserer-Offroy
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zfef3je

steps.title: Coat 24-well plates with Poly-L-Lysine (this...
steps.instruction: Coat 24-well plates with Poly-L-Lysine (this need to be done in a biological safety cabinet to ensure sterility).

steps.title: Add 300 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of 0.1 mg/mL Poly-L-Lysine solution in each well of the 24-well plate and incubate 00:10:00 at Room temperature . This can be done using a 300µL multichannel pipet fitted with 4 tips

steps.title: Remove the Poly-L-Lysine solution (this solution...
steps.instruction: Remove the Poly-L-Lysine solution (this solution can be re-used up to 4 times to coat cell culture plasticware). This can be done using a 300µL multichannel pipet fitted with 4 tips

steps.title: Rinse the wells twice with 300 µL of sterile water
steps.instruction: Rinse the wells twice with 300 µL of sterile water.

steps.title: Let dry the 24-well plate without...
steps.instruction: Let dry the 24-well plate without lid under the biological safety cabinet for 00:20:00 before seeding cells. Poly-L-Lysine-coated plates can be stored for several weeks at Room temperature befor use.

steps.title: Prepare transfections of plasmids encoding HA...
steps.instruction: Prepare transfections of plasmids encoding HA tagged-GPCRs (this need to be done in a biological safety cabinet to ensure sterility). In the case you want to compare expression of a mutant receptor, positive and negative controls are needed to normalize the results. The positive control should be the wild-type receptor and the negative control should be cells transfected with the empy vector (MOCK cells). For 3 well of the 24-well plate:

steps.title: Add 300 µL of Opti-MEM into a sterile 5mL tube
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of Opti-MEM into a sterile 5mL tube.

steps.title: Prepare HEK293 cells for transfection (this...
steps.instruction: Prepare HEK293 cells for transfection (this need to be done in a biological safety cabinet to ensure sterility). Ideally, cells were seeded at a density of 3 million cells per 10cm-pretri dish 48h before transfection to ensure a high transfection rate.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 µg of plasmidic DNA encoding for the desired HA tagged-GPCR to the tube containing Opti-MEM and mix.

steps.title: Add 3 µL of P3000 Reagent...
steps.instruction: Add 3 µL of P3000 Reagent to the tube and mix.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.25 µL of Lipofectamine 3000 to the tube, mix, and incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Remove culture media and rinse cells with PBS
steps.instruction: Remove culture media and rinse cells with PBS.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 0.25% Trypsin to a 10-cm petri dish and incubate for 00:02:00 at 37 °C .

steps.title: Add 5 mL of complete DMEM...
steps.instruction: Add 5 mL of complete DMEM (10% FBS, 20mM HEPES, Penicilin/Streptomycin) to the petri dish and dissociate cells by pipeting up and down.

steps.title: Count cells using an automated cell counter or a hemacytometer
steps.instruction: Count cells using an automated cell counter or a hemacytometer. MOXI Z Mini (Automated Cell Counter, Orflo, MXZ001, https://www.orflo.com/product_p/mxz001.htm )

steps.title: Add 2 mL of the cell...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL of the cell suspension at 150,000 cells/mL to the 5mL tube containing the plasmidic DNA and mix gently.

steps.title: Dispense 450 µL of the mix...
steps.instruction: Dispense 450 µL of the mix of cell and plasmidic DNA to the desired wells of the Poly-L-Lysine-coated 24-well plate.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C, in humidified...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C, in humidified chamber at 5% CO2 for 48:00:00 .

steps.title: Detection of cell surface expression by...
steps.instruction: Detection of cell surface expression by ELISA (this part of the protocol can be done on the wet bench). Buffer and reagents in this part of the protocol can be dispensed to the 24-well plate using combitips and a single channel repeater. M4 Repeater (Multidispense pipet, Eppendorf, 4982000322, https://online-shop.eppendorf.ca/CA-en/Manual-Liquid-Handling-44563/Manual-Pipetting--Dispensing-44564/Repeater-M4-PF-44619.html )

steps.title: Remove cell culture media and wash...
steps.instruction: Remove cell culture media and wash each well with 400 µL of PBS.

steps.title: Fix cells using 400 µL of 3
steps.instruction: Fix cells using 400 µL of 3.7 Mass Percent formaldehyde in TBS for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Rinse cells three times with 500 µL of TBS
steps.instruction: Rinse cells three times with 500 µL of TBS.

steps.title: Block non-specific sites using 400 µL...
steps.instruction: Block non-specific sites using 400 µL of 3 Mass Percent non-fat dry milk disolved in TBS for 00:30:00 under gentle orbital agitation. In case non-fat dry milk is not suitable for blocking non-specific sites, a solution of 1 Mass Percent of Bovine Serum Albumine in TBS can be used. The same solution must also be used for the incubation of the antibody.

steps.title: Remove blocking solution and add 250...
steps.instruction: Remove blocking solution and add 250 µL of 1/1000 dilution of HRP-linked anti-HA antiboby diluted in 3 Mass Percent non-fat dry milk in TBS for 03:00:00 under gentle orbital agitation. This incubation step can also be done Overnight at 4 °C under gentle orbital agitation.

steps.title: Remove antibody solution and wash each...
steps.instruction: Remove antibody solution and wash each well three times with 500 µL of TBS.

steps.title: Add 250 µL of Room temperature...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL of Room temperature 3, 3′,5 ,5′-Tetramethylbenzidine (TMB) Liquid Substrate, Supersensitive, for ELISA and incubate under gentle orbital agitation for 2 to 15 min (until the color of your positive control turn intense blue).

steps.title: Stop the TMB reaction by adding...
steps.instruction: Stop the TMB reaction by adding 250 µL of 2 Molarity (M) Hydroclhoric Acid (HCl).

steps.title: Transfer 100 µL of the colorimetric...
steps.instruction: Transfer 100 µL of the colorimetric reaction to a flat-bottom transparent 96-well plate.

steps.title: Read the absorbance at 450nm using a multimode plate reader
steps.instruction: Read the absorbance at 450nm using a multimode plate reader. Mithras2 LB943 (Multimode plate reader, Berthold, LB943)

steps.title: As this quantification of cell surface...
steps.instruction: As this quantification of cell surface expression is a semi-quantitative method it should not be presented as raw OD 450nm values but rather as a percentage of expression compared to the positive control (or wild-type receptor). To normalize the results, average the OD 450nm of the positive control and the OD 450nm of the negative control and apply the following formula: Normalization formula y = normalized value x = OD 450nm value of the sample x min = mean OD 450nm value of the negative control x max = mean OD 450nm value of the positive control
